calendar.matters:
Petition For Confirmation Of Real Property As Property Of Trust Estate
Off Calendar Dec-30-2009 Denied
MINI MINUTES: Appearances: Michael Hsu for Godfrey Suen and Emily Randall (Petitioners).

Mr. Hsu stated that the property was listed on the updated schedule, that the CPA prepared the spread sheet and that the property was under the family trust. The matter was taken under submission.

Judge Pro Temp: Sue M. Kaplan. Reporter: Arlene Howell, CSR#2542. Clerk: Rosie Noguera. Bailiff: Deputy J. Capozzoli.

Petition For Confirmation Of Real Property As Property Of Trust Estate
Off Calendar Dec-07-2009 Continued To Dec-21-09 At 09:00 A.M. In Dept 204

Off Calendar Oct-19-2009 Continued To Dec-07-09 At 09:00 A.M. In Dept 204
